programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Hold That Mork
programme.desc: Nelson tries to further his political career by getting Mork the opportunity to try out to be a Denver Broncos cheerleader.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Jeanie Loves Mork
programme.desc: Mindy takes a job writing the Miss Lonely Hearts newspaper column and unknowingly encourages Jean to pursue a romantic relationship with Mork.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: The Way Mork Were
programme.desc: Fred confesses that he's having marital difficulties, so Mork and Mindy relay stories of their troubled times.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Putting the Ork Back In Mork (Part 2)
programme.desc: It could be Mork's last night on Earth when an ancient Orkan elder who looks like a ten-year-old boy arrives with the news that Mork must return to Ork for forecycling because he has picked up too many Earthly ways.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork In Never-Never Land
programme.desc: With Mindy depressed about not getting a scholarship, it's up to Mork to stir up some laughs, so he brings home a friend who claims to be the real Peter Pan, with the power to fly as just one of his magical talents.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Dueling Skates
programme.desc: It's the biggest, funniest roller marathon ever when Mork takes to skates for the first time to race a cheating champion skater down a Rocky Mountain peak into Boulder to save the day care center at which he works from destruction.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork the Prankster
programme.desc: Spaceman Mork gets so cosmically carried away with pulling practical jokes that he surprises Mindy by assembling her jeep in their living room right over Mr. Bickley's apartment - with disastrous results.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork, The Monkey's Uncle
programme.desc: Mork turns the apartment he shares with Mindy into a hilarious hideaway for a young chimpanzee that he kidnaps from the Boulder zoo in the mistaken belief that the animal's mother has been abducted.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork's New Look
programme.desc: Mork sends the face-lifting business into orbit when he hilariously rushes to a plastic surgeon to shoot the works after Mindy gives Mork the idea that everyone could use a little improverrent on Mork & Mindy.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Depopulation Agenda
programme.desc: Richard interviews an investigative health reporter and a NY Times best-selling author about their claims that a powerful cabal is waging war on mankind through forced sterilization, vaccination and other means.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Mokele Mbembe
programme.desc: Mokele Mbembe means able to stem the flow of rivers. The Pygmies there say they have encountered just such a creature and according to their descriptions, this behemoth is a dead ringer for an Apotosaurus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Bigfoot
programme.desc: Two prominent Bigfoot trackers and a cryptozoologist affirm the existence of this shy and elusive creature and relate several close encounters with Sasquatch.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The O'Hare UFO Incident
programme.desc: Richard investigates a UFO sighting over Chicago's O'Hare airport that was witnessed by dozens of people, including an airline captain, his crew and several airport officials.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: Richard investigates a legendary naval military experiment said to have been carried out at the Philadelphia Naval Shipyard in October 1943.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1997, an extraordinary event occurred across the state of Arizona that has become the subject of great debate in the UFO community.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Agenda 21
programme.desc: Is Agenda 21 simply a non-binding, voluntarily implemented action plan of the United Nations with regard to sustainable development?

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: EXTRA TERRESTRIAL
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries explores extraterrestrial phenomena like ship and aircraft vanishings, Area 51, close encounters, classified projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS CREATURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries examines mysterious creatures that may live in Earth including the chupacabra, the Loch Ness Monster, the thunderbird,) the yeti or Bigfoot.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SACRED BUILDINGS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the sacred places and buildings of ancient and medieval people including the Great Pyramid of Giza, Chartres Cathedral, Derinkuyu Underground City, Santiago de Compostela Catherdral.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Defying Gravity
programme.desc: George experiences extremes of aviation and space training aboard Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, inside Zero-G plane, simulating zero gravity by diving 30,000 feet in giant parabolas and in spinning centrifuges producing 6 G's of force.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Midwest Stormfest
programme.desc: This season the tornadoes begin early - in February. Through the season, George follows the big weather from Missouri west to the Dakotas, and dodges the huge, destructive Greensburg tornado in southern Kansas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Polynesian Volcanoes
programme.desc: In New Zealand, George learns that an undersea volcano 1000 miles North in Tonga is creating a new island. After nautical mishaps, clad in nothing but underwear and a life jacket, George becomes one of the first explorers on this new land.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Iceland: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: George meets President of Iceland Ólafur Grímsson who spearheaded use of geothermal power; visits Blue Lagoon and geysers; explores volcanically active Haimaey Island and climbs an iceberg calving off the glaciers at Vatnajokull Lagoon.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Crystal Cave
programme.desc: In 2000 in Chihuahua, Mexico, miners found a cave filled with giant crystals. Temperatures reach 120 degrees F and humidity nearly 100%. George leads an Explorers Club Flag Expedition into this extreme environment.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fin Del Mundo
programme.desc: Although he admits to not being much of a sailor, George climbs aboard a sailing vessel to explore the extreme southern tip of South America (Fin Del Mundo aka the "End of the World").

programme.title: Angry Planet: Monsoon
programme.desc: In India's monsoon season George wades through waist-deep water in Bombay and leach-filled waterfalls in Goa, finds people being swept away by rivers, and rebuilding bridges. He experiences an intense annual Hindu celebration.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Under Pressure
programme.desc: After submarine exploration of Grand Cayman Island, George dives with Canadian Armed Forces' experimental deep pressure unit. With explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuytten he investigates newly discovered "Black Smoker" deep sea vents.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Winds Of Autumn
programme.desc: This year he starts off by getting prepared in a wind tunnel, then he and his chase partner Mark Robinson head to Newfoundland for more wild weather action. Then, it's off to another encounter where the wild wind fans a raging inferno.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Weather Season
programme.desc: 2005 seemed to be the year that Earth went wild. Follow George as he brings us back to the site of his hairiest adventures from that year.

programme.title: The New Frontier: GIANTS IN THE DARK
programme.desc: Asteroids, the debris from the early solar system hold tantalizing clues to planetary formation. The spacecraft Psyche readies to study a unique metallic asteroid.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Return To The Moon
programme.desc: The Moon, our closest celestial companion. Our indispensible dance partner through the cosmos.

programme.title: The New Frontier: From There To Here
programme.desc: Series introduction and the study of Earth from orbit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: INCREASING ORBIT
programme.desc: The ISS is the workhorse of the international spacefaring community, but its days are numbered. R

programme.title: The New Frontier: Invasion on Mars
programme.desc: The EXO Mars and Curiosity continue their scientific discoveries as we prepare new missions both robotic and manned to the Red planet Mars.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Shore To Shore
programme.desc: Our seafaring nature has translated well to the space age, seeking to sail out into the unknown in search of riches of one kind or another.

programme.title: The New Frontier: THE NEXT BIG LEAPS
programme.desc: Projects in the works. SunRISE, SPHEREx, NEOS and others, their mission to expand our knowledge of Earth, the surrounding space, Dark Matter, and the earliest galaxies. N

programme.title: The New Frontier: Mercury Or Bust
programme.desc: The ESA - JAXA joint Bepi-Colombo Mission is moments away from launch.

programme.title: RISING TIDES
programme.desc: The next generation of Earth observation satellites are now in place maintaining the continuity of long-term climate data, in particular the planets rising temperatures and related ocean levels.

programme.title: Wild Iran: To the South
programme.desc: At the first part of his journey, the photographer is lucky to get some shots of rare animal species. Between the gaps of the rocky mountains he traces funny creatures: Pica.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Southwest China - China’s Secret Garden
programme.desc: Tucked away in China’s southwest corner is a hidden oasis unlike any other. Snow-capped mountains, temperate valleys and tropical jungles are home to a spectacular array of wildlife.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Rainforest
programme.desc: Daintree National Park is a magical meeting of rainforest and reef, lying at the heart of the world heritage listed wet tropics of Queensland.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Pacific
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian runs into issues as he attempts some last minute changes.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: In the season finale, Ian tries to bring it all together.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian and his most ambitious client break all the rules and build the ultimate boat-inspired, open-aired cruiser. (Part 1)

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian and his most ambitious client continue the ultimate open-aired cruiser build and debut it a top West Coast car show. (Part 2)

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian gets a call from a top Hollywood picture car coordinator and works his magic to get a vintage race car back in action.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian is commissioned to help build a wild, massive mobile floating party island for a prestigious festival in the Nevada desert (Burning Man).

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Prayers and Mace
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: New Dog in Town
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs. He surprises Beth with Delilah, a puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand. Beth is so happy that she insists on taking the puppy with her on today's bounty.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors but instead of hunting for treats they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Girl Trouble
programme.desc: Dog and the team have girl trouble in this case. Krystal jumped bail and seems to have vanished into the high plains of Colorado. To make matters worse, she's running with her lover (and bond co-signer) Carrie. But Thelma and Louise they ain't.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Seeing the Light
programme.desc: Today Leland and Dog make a quick visit to the police supply store to get some new gadgets for the team but they can't linger because they've also got a fugitive to catch. Their target is reputed to have an explosive temper.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: When a Stranger Calls
programme.desc: When an offender with a long record ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call - The Dog!? And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Jack & Jill
programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Glory Is the Reward of Mallard
programme.desc: When Willie takes a business trip to Scotland to expand his duck call business, he brings the entire family along so they can reconnect with their Scottish roots. Willie organizes a bus tour to trace his family heritage.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Night and Good Duck
programme.desc: A special holiday episode of Duck Dynasty shows when the Robertson family took over the Thanksgiving special of a local TV show "Good Morning Arklamiss." Each family member presents a special holiday segment, with Willie and Jase serving as anchormen.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack in the Saddle
programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin and Godwin.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Robertsons help a long time employee whose Mom has fallen on hard times by buying her a brand new house for Christmas. Jep, Jase, Martin and Godwin race to finish a deck in time for the big reveal, only to get sidetracked by a hammering competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Cannonball Runs
programme.desc: Jase enters an outhouse race to help promote Willie's Duck Diner, but when the Robertsons show up for the race, they face an unexpected rival - Phillip McMillan. Meanwhile, Willie attempts to create the world's greatest bologna sandwich.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Mo Math, Mo Problems
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie, they rekindle an old argument of whether Jase can outrun a truck.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Coop! There It Is!
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project - renovating the chicken coop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Friday Afternoon Lights
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Master and Duck Commander
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Inlawful Entry
programme.desc: When Missy's parents visit, her father convinces Jase to take him on a quail hunt. But while their "bonding hunt" yields very few quail, it does bring them closer together as friends. Meanwhile, Willie helps John Luke start his own snow cone business.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Flock and Key
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box. Meanwhile, Jase helps Mia prepare for her cheerleading competition, but the only problem is he has no idea.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Correspondent
programme.desc: A war correspondent finds himself imprisoned and facing execution. Meanwhile, Jonathan and Mark show him what's he's missed during his life by putting work ahead of family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Aloha
programme.desc: A Hawaiian singer learns to overcome self-pity after being disabled in a truck accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Dolphin Song for Lee - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help a teenage cancer patient named Lee who wants to save the dolphins.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Lee's cancer is now in remission. She gets back to work on her save-the-dolphins campaign.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Heaven Nose, Mister Smith
programme.desc: Jonathan must stop an angel who's back on Earth with the intention of breaking up his son's marriage.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Trial, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Blake's hopes for victory are crushed by a drunken witness; Bart is dropped as a senatorial candidate; the woman who can clear Blake's name is forced to conceal her identity.

programme.title: Dynasty: Vote
programme.desc: Blake loses the trial and now fears losing Denver-Carrington; Ben and Alexis pit themselves against Blake and Caress; Garrett learns that he is Jackie's father; a reporter's lies intensify the battle between Alexis and Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Warning
programme.desc: Caress discovers Emily and Ben's secret and Blake is double-crossed by an old friend. Alexis schemes to turn the Chinese government against Blake; Claudia threatens to reveal Adam's power of attorney over Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Cry
programme.desc: Blake is tricked into borrowing money from Alexis; Jackie returns home to some shocking news; Blake learns the identity of the woman who can save his reputation; ignored by family and taunted by a reporter, Amanda attempts suicide.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Rescue
programme.desc: The guilt-ridden Alexis fears she is too late when she finds Amanda unconscious; Dominique proposes to Garrett; Steven believes he may lose Danny to Sammy Jo and Clay; Ben makes special plans for Caress and Alexis.

programme.title: War Story: D-Day plus 1
programme.desc: The Canadian stand against the 12th SS Panzer Division Hitlerjugend immediately after D-Day allowed the Allies to switch to the offensive and truly begin the liberation of Europe.

programme.title: War Story: Falaise, the corridor of death
programme.desc: The Canadian army played the pivotal role in closing the Falaise Gap and ensuring Allied victory in the Normandy Campaign in August 1944.

programme.title: War Story: Where Hell is: The Leopold and the Scheldt
programme.desc: The Allies liberated Antwerp, the world’s largest deep-water port, on 4 September 1944, but it could only be accessed via the Scheldt Estuary, the perfect place for the Germans to make a stand.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In April and May 1945, the long-suffering Dutch people, enduring the German-imposed Hongerwinter famine, enthusiastically welcomed their Canadian liberators, establishing the intense connection sustained for 70 years.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Lost Tanks of D-Day
programme.desc: In Normandy, June 6, 1944, a dozen Sherman tanks equipped with floats, the famous Duplex Drives (DD), leave their ship to swim to Omaha Beach... not all of them make it.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Last Flight of the B-17
programme.desc: Twenty-six metres beneath the waves at the foot of the majestic Calvi Citadel in Corsica lies an American plane from the Second World War.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren & Derek
programme.desc: Lauren met Derek online years ago. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend. Lauren thinks Derek could be the one, so why has he avoided meeting her?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Long Islander Catherine has fallen in love with Graham from Tennessee. She's ready to uproot her life to be with him, but Nev and Max discover that Graham's not everything he claims to be. (S5, ep18)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Alante has been planning a life with his online love. She's perfect but her disappearances have Alante worried. Nev and Max help uncover a truth that affects Alante's entire town. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Mama doesn't always know best. Shuntay enlists the help of Nev and Max after her mum begins talking about marriage and uprooting her family to be with a man who refuses to meet in person. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: John & Kelsey
programme.desc: John is ready to leave Detroit but one thing holds him back: Kelsey. The two have never spoken outside of online chats but John is sure she's the one. Can he include Kelsey in his plans?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Divorcee Shawny calls Nev and Max to help uncover the shadowy identity of her attempt at new love. But things get interesting as they discover that Shawny may have secrets of her own. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 203
programme.desc: Antonio will tell his long time friend, Megan, that he loves her. Stormy has to let her gay best friend know that she thinks they have something special.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 204
programme.desc: Jojo reveals that he loves his best friend, Sydney. Kristen wants to let her best friend Jeremiah know that she has a crush on him.

programme.title: The Hills: I Always Had A Little Crush
programme.desc: Audrina hooks up with Brody when the girls crash the boys' surf trip to Hawaii. Heidi's virgin ex-boyfriend comes to visit, and she hopes some of his values will rub off on Spencer. (S5, ep5)

programme.title: The Hills: Playmates Bring the Drama
programme.desc: Audrina's heartbroken as Brody's girlfriend confronts her about Hawaii, and Brody does nothing to stop it. Heidi sees a text message from Stacie to Spencer and confronts her in a club. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: The Hills: Keep Your Enemies Closer
programme.desc: Justin confronts Audrina about hooking up with Brody. Stephanie ruins a photo shoot at work, and Lauren will have to answer to Kelly. Heidi warns Stacie to stay out of her life. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: The Hills: Father of The Bride
programme.desc: Spencer tries to save his and Heidi's relationship by asking her dad's permission to marry her. Lauren must fire Stephanie, who's heartbroken, as the guy she likes has a girlfriend. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: The Hills: Hi Lauren, It's Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren thinks twice about going to Heidi's wedding after Spencer finally apologises. Brody refuses to risk his relationship with Jayde to save his friendship with Audrina. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: The Hills: Season Finale
programme.desc: In Lauren's final episode, she must decide if she'll forgive Spencer and go to the wedding. The drama in the pews beats that at the altar, until a surprise guest shocks everyone! (S5, ep10)

programme.title: The City: The Past Catches Up
programme.desc: When the gang goes to Miami for the weekend, Jay runs into his ex-girlfriend Danielle and Whitney wonders if the rumours about them might be true after all. (S1, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Two Steps Forward
programme.desc: Things between Leah and Corey turn ugly, Chelsea decides to celebrate her break-up, Jenelle's plans start to crumble and Kailyn settles into life at her mum's house.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: One Step Back
programme.desc: Chelsea argues with Adam about child support, Jenelle has to face the music, Kailyn tries to focus on college and Leah and Corey get closer.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Chelsea's dad tries to cut Adam out of her life, Jenelle is arrested for breaking and entering, Kailyn signs a joint custody agreement and Leah and Corey tie the knot. Last in the series.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Finale Special: Check Up With Dr. Drew
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the cast of Teen Mom 2 on-stage in front of a live studio audience. Jenelle, Chelsea, Kailyn and Leah reflect on the struggles of their first year of motherhood.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 1 Unseen Moment
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look at the humour and the heartbreaking moments never before seen with Kailyn, Leah, Jenelle and Chelsea from the first season of Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Hidden in Plain Sight 1935-1938
programme.desc: Hidden In Plain Sight 1935-1938: In 1934, Hitler's government is firmly in the saddle. Most Germans support Hitler's anti-Jewish policy and the regime's terror soon escalates.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Up in Flames 1936-1940
programme.desc: Up in Flames 1936-1940: At the end of 1939, the German Army invades Poland. Examine how Hitler succeeded in pushing through his rearmament and war plans relatively unhindered.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942
programme.desc: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942: In the shadow of the war, the Nazi regime gradually advances its "final solution to the Jewish problem", culminating in the Holocaust.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Genocide 1942-1944
programme.desc: Genocide 1942 - 1944: Along with Treblinka and Majdanek, Sobibor was one of the camps used in Operation Reinhard, in which the Nazis murdered almost two million people.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Armageddon 1943-1945
programme.desc: Armageddon 1943-1945: The defeat at Stalingrad in 1943 was the turning point of the war and convinced the Nazi leadership to intensify their terror and propaganda campaigns.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Reckoning 1945-1948
programme.desc: The Reckoning 1945-1948: In 1945, WWII was over but the violence had not ended. The survivors want to blame the Germans. The reckoning with National Socialism is ambivalent.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Payback's a Fish
programme.desc: After going bust on his last trip and coming home empty-handed, Marciano of Hard Merchandise now wrestles with the trials of being a husband and father who has to be away from home so often.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: Tuna.com continues its winning streak, catching two fish in one day while the rest of the fleet struggles to even find a spot to fish in between the weekend recreational boaters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Size Matters
programme.desc: Meet Kevin and the Christina, a boat that gets its own real-life fish story when it snags an 1,100-pound \\"monstah\\" right out of the gate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Greed, Ego & Jealousy
programme.desc: After watching the Christina catch the biggest tuna of the season, the uber-competitive Captain Dave of the Tuna.com is obsessed with beating the record, and catching a fish bigger than 1,075 lbs!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mann gegen Sturm
programme.desc: Marciano, captain of Hard Merchandise, risks the elements to hook a giant bluefin and finds himself with boat trouble in the midst of the storm.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: It's a late night for two Michigan Conservation Officers as an investigation into a hunting blind on federal property turns into much more.The area is also home to a once nearly extinct bird that is now making a comeback.

programme.title: Wardens: Chasing the Big One
programme.desc: Montana Wardens spend a week tracking the killer of two out of season deer.Anonymous tips and eye witness accounts keep the Wardens hot on a trail filled with many twists and turns.

programme.title: Wardens: Buggy-ing Out
programme.desc: The Fourth of July weekend in Silver Lake State Park is a non-stop party. It's always a thrill ride as Michigan Conservation Officers help patrol the park during this busy time and make keeping the peace their number one priority.

programme.title: Wardens: Counting Shells
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers spend a lot of time enforcing the laws of waterfowl hunting. Using canoes, they work silently across the state's largest game area. It's not all work as one officer oversees a class trip to the pheasant field.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Opening Day looking for antlers is like a Christmas morning for shed hunters.A few are willing to break the law for a crack at a monster shed.Montana Wardens are on the look out for one offender who is no stranger to a run-in with the law.

programme.title: Wardens: Interstate Travel
programme.desc: To slow the spread of CWD, Michigan Conservation Officers work Opening Day to make sure no deer come in from infected states.Their goal is to stop any deer that don't belong.Suspect deer are checked at the Wildlife Disease Lab.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Montana - Wardens use everything from a deer decoy to a K-9 to make sure hunters are following the rules.

programme.title: Wardens: Deer Patrol Bros
programme.desc: During the opening week, COs and brothers Bill and Shane Webster patrol the state using vastly different strategies. Bill is on aerial patrol looking for illegal bait piles while Shane is working the web to track down offenders.

programme.title: Wardens: Rural Road Huntin'
programme.desc: The opening week of firearm deer season is one the year's busiest. Officers in Districts 3 and 6 tackle road hunting issues in rural Michigan.

programme.title: Wardens: Still on the List
programme.desc: Officers in both the lower and upper peninsula of Michigan work to stop hunters from baiting for bear too early.

programme.title: Wardens: Kings Hill
programme.desc: Warden Bryan Golie investigates a call of shots fired on private property during the big game season and is in for one long night.

programme.title: Alien Contact: Secret Societies
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago a special, genetically advanced race of beings came to Earth. They were seen as Gods by primitive man and worshipped. They set themselves apart.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens : Origin Of Humanity
programme.desc: Increasing evidence and sightings of UFOs suggest contact with extraterrestrial beings who may have influenced the origins of human life.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Question
programme.desc: Join Philip Coppens, star of the History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series, as he provides proof that UFO's helmed by Extraterrestrials from other worlds came to Earth millennia ago.

programme.title: Aliens and Pyramids
programme.desc: Many pyramidal structures around the world exhibit strange glyphs of futuristic objects and signs of advanced machining with laser perfection. Was there help from an extraterrestrial source?

programme.desc: Gary and Emma share some special news and Aaron gets stuck into training. Holly goes to the House of Lords and Marnie and Casey get a shock when an photo of Casey is sent to a newspaper. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Arthur: The Good Sport/Crushed

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella's Tent of Portent/Mutiny on the Pitch
programme.desc: At the Elwood City Picnic, Prunella pretends she can see the future at her fortune telling booth. The Lakewood Elementary soccer team has had enough of Francine's bossy behavior.

programme.title: Arthur: My Club Rules/Stolen Bike
programme.desc: The gang can't agree on rules for their club, and each starts his own. Next, Francine's embarrassed by her crummy old bike. Why can't she have a shiny new one like all her friends?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Dummy Disaster/Francine and The Feline
programme.desc: When painfully shy George brings a ventriloquist dummy to school, a popular kid is born! Then, Arthur thinks the best pet to have is a dog, and Francine probably would have agreed--that is, until little Nemo, a cute kitten, came along.

programme.title: Arthur: Hide And Snake/Muffy's New Best Friend
programme.desc: The kids capture a snake and learn that it's possibly poisonous--after it gets lost in Arthur's house! Why is Muffy interviewing for a new best friend? She and Francine are usually inseparable, but lately it seems they have less in common.

programme.title: Arthur: Baby Kate and the Imaginary Mystery/Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: Nadine, D.W.'s imaginary friend is missing. Sue Ellen can't wait to travel on an old-fashioned train, but once onboard, she discovers that the train is not as spectacular as she had hoped–until she finds a mysterious diary.

programme.title: Arthur: Cast Away/The Great Sock Mystery
programme.desc: Arthur is thrilled when Dad invites him to go fly-fishing for the weekend. But a change in plans forces them to include D.W. Find out once and for all where socks disappear to when Baby Kate and Pal team up to solve the great sock mystery.

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy Who Cried Comet/Arthur and Los Vecinos
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that he's seen real UFO's, and he uses Muffy's fancy new telescope to get the proof. Then, Mr. Sipple from next door is moving away and Arthur wonders--who will be the new neighbors?

programme.title: Arthur: Vomitrocious!/Sue Ellen Chickens Out
programme.desc: It's just a regular day until Francine starts to feel queasy, and then throws up in the cafeteria! Now Francine is afraid to go back to school. And, Sue Ellen learns that a fast-food chain is taking over the beloved Sugar Bowl.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ sings that he wants to be a rock and roll star. Baby Bop sings that she wants to be a country music star. BJ gets mistaken for the artist who painted a portrait of Barney.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big As Barney - The Chase
programme.desc: When Ryan notices how much everyone loves Barney, he tries to be just like him; but he has a hard time filling Barney's shoes. Then Ryan learns that he is special when he's just being himself!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race./When BJ starts to feel sick after eating too many sweets, he lies down in hopes of feeling better.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Mother Goose - Fun With Reading
programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that "The Land of Mother Goose" truly exists. Several Mother Goose characters have come to ask for help! Parts of their rhymes are missing! When Mother Goose arrives, she fixes the problem.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff can’t find his drumsticks anywhere. Barney helps Baby Bop explore many different jobs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Sari, No One's Home

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Bridge Too Close, Part 1
programme.desc: Sari has to defend the Autobot home base from invading Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Bridge Too Close, Part 2
programme.desc: Megatron comes up with a plan to build a space bridge to Cybertron. However, he needs to capture Bulkhead, an expert space bridge mechanic, in order to build the bridge. Megatron's ultimate goal is to take over Cybertron and eventually the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transwarped, Part 1

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transwarped, Part 2

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transwarped, Part 3

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Three's A Crowd

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Where Is Thy Sting?

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Predacons Rising
programme.desc: When Sentinel Prime successfully captures fugitive Decepticons, Prowl becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Human Error, Part 1
programme.desc: The Autobots and the Elite Guard pursue Wasp for their own agenda. However, Blackarachnia has Swoop capture Wasp in her latest attempt to rid herself of her organic half. This experiment goes awry and turns Wasp into Waspinator.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Merged Zamasu's immortality is limited, Vegeta and Goku ask the Supreme Kais for help, their combined strength tries to prevail over such a significant threat.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Merged Zamasu's ashes rise to create a universe encompassing darkness, out of energy and out of options, Goku needs some help, and fast.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku summons Shenron with the Dragon Balls to fulfil a promise to revive King Kai, but Bulma, Gohan and others arrive on the scene, each hoping to get their own wishes granted.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: During an invention award show, a robot girl crashes the party; tricked by Dr. Mashirito, she has an urge to play and won't let Saiyans get in her way.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: With Majin Buu defeated, Goku has taken a completely new role as a... farmer?! Now, with Earth at peace, our heroes have settled into normal lives.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku is convinced that someone is trying to kill him, and he is ready to fight for his life.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku narrowly escapes death and launches a counterattack on Hit, having learned Hit's secret technique; their battle draws spectators from two universes.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Gohan accepts an opportunity to be a stunt double in the Great Saiyaman movie, but keeping his identity as the real Great Saiyaman a secret proves difficult when a parasitic alien arrives in town.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Barry, the self-absorbed actor, tries to undermine Gohan's reputation. Also, when the parasite chooses Barry as its host, it is not just Gohan who is in trouble.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Everyone is too busy to spar with Goku, so he seeks out Krillin for old times' sake; disappointed in his current combat ability, Krillin decides that he is in dire need of retraining.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Upon entering a strange cave, Krillin and Goku are confronted by enemies from their past. Krillin must find the courage to defeat them or history could repeat itself.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Simone and Cacha help make colourful costumes and then dance in a Carnival. Laa-Laa loves to play with her ball, it bounces everywhere. A magic house appears before it's time for Tubby Bye-Bye.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky fetches the others to watch two little boys making bread. They kneed the dough and once it is baked they eat the bread with jam.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and some children visit some cygnets. In Teletubbyland, it's time for the Tubbies to go to bed, but Po is not tired, so she rides her scooter.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa fetches the others to watch a little girl called Catherine play with her toy farm. A magical new event happens in Teletubbyland – Bo Peep has lost her sheep and doesn’t know where to find them.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children feed some birds and watch them playing on the bird table. In Teletubbyland, it's timer for Tubby Custard, but Dipsy spills his all over a Tubby Seat. No-one wants to sit in the Tubby Custard, so Noo-Noo tidies it up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's time for toast in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies and a group of children see Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the Yellow Cow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy show his friend his scrapbook. Tinky Winky puts Dipsy’s hat inside his bag. Then the Noo Noo sucks Tinky Winky’s bag inside his tummy.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy with his grandad’s pigeons. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies go out to play. They play on the hills spinning around and waving their arms.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children learn about the colour blue. In Teletubbyland Po is watching the blue sky when it begins to rain. She finds a blue puddle and is delighted when she sees her reflection.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies love to dance. They watch some children perform in a Ballet Show. Dipsy dances in his bed and Laa-Laa dances whilst making Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Mayor asks Bob to build a Pets Corner in the local park. Farmer Pickles has picked up a selection of animals for it – including a chinchilla – and sends Travis and Spud off to deliver them to Bob. Unfortunately Bob runs out of chicken wire.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is installing an antique fireplace for Mrs Percival. He goes to JJ’s yard to collect it and finds JJ playing with his new model aeroplane. Bob then heads to Mrs Percival’s and starts to knock out the old fireplace.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is demolishing an old house, and sends the floorboards and roof tiles for recycling. As he finishes the job, he gets a call from Mr Bentley who wants him to renovate the museum’s annexe, where Mr Ellis plans to exhibit the work of local artists.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has bought a new attachment for Benny to try. It looks a bit big and heavy, but Benny is desperate to try it out so Bob promises he can as long as he’s with him to help. Bob gets an excited phone call from Sandy Beech up at the cave house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a goat run for Farmer Pickles new goat – Giddy. It’s Travis’s job to collect Giddy from Meg MacDonald the goat breeder. Spud teases Travis about being slow and Travis resolves to collect the goat very quickly.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are installing a bull-rush water recycling system to clean water from Farmer Pickles’ cottage. The clean water will be used to water Farmer Pickles new orchard. Bob explains that everything needs to be built in order – it’s a process.

programme.title: Green Builds and Recycling Centres
programme.desc: Bob’s back On Site! Join Bob as he shows you the amazing world of eco homes and recycling centres and learn how things you throw away can be used to make something new.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Wendy and Bob have a very special announcement to make. They are going to fix up an old Houseboat for Wendy to live in. There’s a lot of hard work to be done. They need to make a gang plank, fix solar panels and give it a really good clean.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Beasley’s pipes and boiler are making banging noises and Bob is called in to replace them. Whilst Bob and Wendy are collecting the new Boiler from JJ, Molly explains that she is looking after Mrs Broadbent’s baby rabbits.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s building a ‘drying tunnel’ for drying Annie seaweed. Muck passes Mr Beasley who’s having a spot of bother with his washing. He decides to build Mr Beasley a drying tunnel for his washing.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Bentley is organising a winter fair in the town hall square and enlists Bob to help set up the stalls, lights and the centrepiece of the fair – a giant inflatable Santa Claus.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Mayor decides that the town needs a drive-in cinema and Bob is asked to build it out in the countryside. The first film to be shown will be “The Invasion of the Giant Bug.”

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are building the road connecting Bob’s mobile home site with the location of the new yard. It’s a big job for Roley, but just as Bob’s explaining the job, a pretty little bird flies overhead clutching some twigs in her beak.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Whilst Bob and the team build Annie Pickles new seafront house, Muck is worried that Scoop is a better digger than he is and decides to prove himself with a sandcastle competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s renovating a dilapidated old watermill in Sunflower Valley – it’s going to make flour from Farmer Pickles sunflower farm. After checking that it’s safe, Bob realises that one of the millstones has gone missing. How very odd!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles asks Bob to build him a roadside stall where he can sell ‘Pick Your Own’ produce. He has even had a Giant Carrot sign made to go on top of the stall to advertise his wares.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: That's got to be them!
programme.desc: Sara and Jane return to a venue they investigated many years ago, this time with Phil and Dale. Phil and Sara have an anxious time in the basement, Dale and Jane are shocked by unexplained heavy footsteps, and don’t even mention the lift…or spiders.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Wish me luck!
programme.desc: A return to a venue that shocked everyone in series one; and this time there are only 3 team members. This investigation has nerve wracking consequences as loud bangs, the sound of doors slamming, voices, and knocking are all experienced.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Did you just say something?"
programme.desc: In the very first episode of Are You Haunted..? the team travels to North Yorkshire. Amongst other things, they investigate a ghostly photograph taken by a member of the public. What will the team uncover during their overnight paranormal investigation?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "That's so freaky!"
programme.desc: In this episode of Are You Haunted..? the team travels to Stockport to investigate stories of shadow figures, phantom voices, mysterious figures, and more. Will they encounter anything paranormal?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: TAPS Meets the Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: The Ghost Hunters enlist the help of Bravo's The Real Housewives of Atlanta as they embark on this week's investigation.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghosts of Christmas Past
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS gets intothe Christmas spirit at New Hampshire's Christmas Farm Inn.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted Town
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS investigates the entire town of Alexandria, Louisiana, where paranormal activity seems to lurk around every corner.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Pennsylvania Asylum
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Chester County, Pennsylvania to investigate the Pennhurst Asylum.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Century of Haunting
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Oxford, Massachusetts to help a family in need. The house has been in the Voas family for two generations, and lots of activity has been reported, from apparitions to shadow figures.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: French Quarter Phantoms
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to America's most haunted city, New Orleans, to investigate the Old U.S. Mint.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dead Legends
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey investigate the famed Hotel Conneaut in northern Pennsylvania. Heavy doors opening on their own, sightings of a boy, a bride and a menacing butcher have the hotel's staff on edge.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?
programme.desc: PRS travels to Newcastle, CA to investigate a house with paranormal forces so strong, the family has cleared out. Ryan believes the Native American land may hold the key to the mystery and leads the team in a fight to reclaim a scared family's house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fury
programme.desc: Kathy, her two daughters and her new husband, "Farmer" thought they had the perfect, quiet life deep in the mountains of West Virginia.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hostage to Fear
programme.desc: P.R.S. is summoned to help a family who has been haunted for years by spirits lurking in the house. Upon arrival the team finds a family that has become prisoners in their own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 2
programme.desc: The strange occurrences at Hayden Hill House switch up a gear as whatever is there seems now to be stalking the team with some terrifying results, at least for some of the crew it is proving too much.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Old House
programme.desc: This week Yvette Fielding takes her Most Haunted team to Coalville and a house that is surrounded by mystery. The team seem to disturb the rest of some of its long-term residence as they battle through a night of terror.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Keithley Bus Museum
programme.desc: Once an old foundry, this large old building houses vehicles from a bygone era that are said to still contain passengers whose destination has never ended.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Judges Lodgings Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette heads to Presteigne, Mid Wales and the famous Judges Lodgings, were courts were held, people imprisoned and Judges stayed, but it also holds many a secret.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Judges Lodgings Part 2
programme.desc: Most Haunted continues its investigation into the Judges Lodgings where the team seem to be under attack and something is trying to get through a door…but what?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Codnor Castle Part 1
programme.desc: The team venture into a cottage where it is said ‘no living soul can endure living there’. With cursed dolls, murder and suicide this derelict place has everything to fear.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters: Refuge in Rosaries

programme.title: A Haunting: Norman the Doll
programme.desc: Paranormal investigator, Stephen Lancaster, doesn’t believe in haunted objects until he captures proof the doll he recently acquired is haunted. Fearing he is in over his head, he attempts to get rid of it, but the doll has other plans.

programme.title: A Haunting: Legend Trippers

programme.title: A Haunting: The Dark Side

programme.title: A Haunting: Child’s Play
programme.desc: The loving spirit of Chris' late grandmother is watching over his close-knit family. But she is trying to warn them: a fierce and relentless demon has crept into their home. Chris reaches out to a paranormal team and a demonologist to battle the demon.

programme.title: A Haunting: Grave Awakenings
programme.desc: When ghosts confront Zoe Dei, she makes the harrowing discovery that her home harbors a paranormal portal which has awakened her dormant ability as psychic medium, forcing her to learn how to live with her newfound ability to see the dead.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: Robin Williams, Mira Sorvino, and Jim Caviezel give dynamic performances in this mind-blowing thriller about the dark side of futuristic technology.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Two young people are entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Bottle Shock
programme.desc: The story of the early days of California wine making featuring the now infamous, blind Paris wine tasting of 1976 that has come to be known as "Judgment of Paris". Feat: Chris Pine, Alan Rickman & Bill Pullman.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: Grind
programme.desc: Four young men embark on a road trip from Chicago to Oceanside, CA, following the summer tour of a skateboard star. Starring Adam Brody ("Shazam!").

programme.title: A Warm December
programme.desc: An African-American doctor falls in love with the niece of an African ambassador during his vacation in London, but it turns out that she is suffering from a rare terminal illness.

programme.title: The House That Dripped Blood
programme.desc: Robert Bloch, the author of Psycho, presents a quartet of terrifying tales. (1971)

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: Alfred Hitchcock mixes suspense, comedy, witty dialog, and endearing character in this charming, classic mystery. When a kindly governess vanishes from a train, no one believes she even exists…except for one woman who sets about solving the mystery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The classic comedy with cool stars and even cooler cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all-star cast in the ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run.

programme.title: Smokey Bites The Dust
programme.desc: This movie follows the rivalry between a small-town southern sheriff and a small-town teenaged thief who steals cars and destroys them with the sheriff's daughter by his side.

programme.title: Dragon Warriors
programme.desc: An evil wizard, Lord Tensley, seeks the hand and heart of the beautiful princess. When she refuses, he locks her away and releases a deadly dragon to terrorize the land. Starring: James Marsters, Kaitlin Doubleday, Luke Perry

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: The personal ads of New York's trendiest magazines become the hunting ground for a bizarre killer whose calling card is a single, high heeled dancing shoe and one woman is determined to find out his true identity after the murder of her friend.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: When Patricia is called to identify a body, she’s shocked to find her mirror image lying dead on a gurney. Determined to find out more about her surprise ‘twin’ and simultaneously, help her mother clear her father's name.

programme.title: Deadly Patient
programme.desc: When Dr. Hillary Spenser saves the life of Gregory Lipton, he becomes dangerously obsessed with her, threatening the good doctor and all those in her life.

programme.title: Drone DR1 (AKA Rotor DR1)
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world where half the population is dead or missing and the sky is full of autonomous drones, a 16-year-old boy named Kitch sets out to find his father, joined by DR1, his drone companion.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: Attack Of The Super Monsters
programme.desc: In the year 2000 the dinosaurs reappear on planet Earth, terrorizing mankind.

programme.title: The Adventures of Greyfriars Bobby
programme.desc: Bobby, a brave Skye Terrier, becomes a local legend when he refuses to leave his master's grave after he dies. Based on true events.

programme.title: The BFG: The Original Movie
programme.desc: A young orphan girl, Sophie, gets taken away to a faraway land populated by Giants and Dreams.

programme.title: The Wind in the Willows - Original Movie
programme.desc: Toad, Rat, Mole and Badger follow animal etiquette in this version of Kenneth Grahame's classic, in stop-motion model animation.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Explore the travel challenges that alien spaceships face, and discover whether humans can tackle interstellar flight.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: UFO Zones: Journey to the world's hottest UFO zones, where physical and paranormal phenomenons and unidentified objects and aliens are reported with alarming frequency.

programme.title: Legends of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: Autumn 1922. Howard Carter had just discovered the tomb and stupendous treasure of Tutankhamun, a pharaoh forgotten by history for 3300 years - and the last descendant of a family that ruled Egypt for eight generations.

programme.title: Legends of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: Hatshepsut was born about 1500 years BCE, at the start of the 18th dynasty. Brought up at the centre of power, she could have been relegated to oblivion, as so many princesses were... However, she was one of Egypt’s greatest rulers.

programme.title: Legends of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: Amenhotep III had inherited a prosperous kingdom and turned it into an immensely powerful empire. Egypt reached the peak of its influence under his reign. From the Luxor Temple to the Colossi of Memnon, he constructed many remarkable monuments.

programme.title: Legends of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: He was one of the most controversial figures of all Antiquity. Crowned pharaoh as Amenhotep IV, he changed his name to Akhenaten whilst repudiating the gods of his ancestors. What role did the enigmatic Akhenaten really play in Egyptian history?

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and team must investigate the deaths of several witnesses for a grand jury case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the disturbing death of a three-year-old girl.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A shocking event during an arrest leads the CSIs to a series of bizarre deaths.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The discovery of a body in a dumpster leads the CSIs to a powerful drug lord.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A double fatality at a Korea Town party has the CSIs on the hunt for a missing boy.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The killing of a teen singing sensation leads the CSIs to re-examine a 1950s murder case.

programme.title: Scorpion: US vs. UN vs. UK
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is blackmailed to break into the United Nations to assist in the assassination of a menacing arms dealer.

programme.title: Scorpion: Arrivals And Departures
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion and Walter's parents visit Megan in the hospital as her health deteriorates, they are quarantined after a deadly fungus outbreak threatens to infect everyone.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Old College Try
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover at a university to find a hacker who infiltrates the Federal Reserve and threatens to collapse the world economy.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dam Breakthrough
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Team Scorpion must prevent a catastrophe when torrential rains create a large crack in a dam, threatening to wipe out an entire town in its wake.

programme.title: Scorpion: White Out
programme.desc: In order to save a United States Special Forces unit from certain death, Team Scorpion must brave the subzero temperatures of Antarctica.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sun of a Gun
programme.desc: Sylvester comes face to face with his estranged father who asks Team Scorpion for help.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Rookie Blue: For Better, For Worse
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division, especially Andy, just wants a quick, smooth shift so they can get to Frank and Noelle’s wedding. But things get complicated when they get called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens

programme.title: Rookie Blue: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted while under the care of Andy and Nick

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op – a case that becomes Traci’s first homicide and forces Andy, Nick and Gail to work overtime

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception
programme.desc: When a suspected pedophile is found beaten within an inch of his life, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting a mania-fueled, off-hours “investigation”

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: An Anglo-Indian teenager does not tell her tradition-minded parents that she has joined a women's soccer team.

programme.title: Finish Line
programme.desc: A former track star's (James Brolin) son (Josh Brolin) resorts to steroids to stay competitive at a West Coast college.

programme.title: Draft Day
programme.desc: On the day of the NFL draft, the general manager of the Cleveland Browns must decide what he's willing to sacrifice as he angles for the number-one pick.

programme.title: Climbing High
programme.desc: A wealthy young man pretends to be poor to try and win the affections of a hard-up model despite his engagement to an aristocrat.

programme.title: Simon and Laura
programme.desc: Married British co-stars of a home-life series finally show their home life as it really is, on live TV.

programme.title: Here Come the Huggetts
programme.desc: A scatterbrained girl disrupts the daily lives of her aunt and uncle when she arrives for a visit.

programme.title: Floodtide
programme.desc: A shipyard worker falls in love with his boss's daughter while working his way to the top.

programme.title: JAG: Father's Day
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are assigned the task of defending a young Marine whose frustration at being unable to wrest custody of his son has led to his being court-martialed for dereliction of duty.

programme.title: JAG: Tiger, Tiger
programme.desc: Harm takes Josh on a weekend cruise for Navy families aboard a frigate. When the frigate is taken over by terrorists who intend to fire missiles at Cuba, Harm and Bud take matters into their own hands to stop the evil plot.

programme.title: JAG: Return of Mimmy Blackhorse
programme.desc: An Army forensic pathologist joins forces with Harm, Mac, Bud and Harriet as they try to verify that newly unearthed human remains are those of a heroic Navajo "code-talker" who had been missing since WWII.

programme.title: JAG: The Imposter
programme.desc: Harm is held captive by Palmer, a renegade government agent with whom he had crossed swords a few months ago. While Palmer prepares a life mask so he can pass for Harm, he explains his plans to assassinate the key witness in the trial.

programme.title: JAG: To Russia With Love
programme.desc: With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When the SRU arrives at a hostage situation at a bank, Sgt. Parker faces one of his toughest negotiations when the robber isn't who he thought.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: On the Case: Evidence of Deception
programme.desc: When a beautiful college coed is found dead in her dorm room police discover a crime scene where nothing is what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case: No One To Trust
programme.desc: A beautiful young girl vanishes on a desolate stretch of highway. Could the man in charge of the investigation be responsible?

programme.title: On the Case: This is for Her
programme.desc: A deadly home invasion leaves a father of three dead. Why was the victim's wife, the only eyewitness to the crime left alive?

programme.title: On the Case: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: When a 26 year old wife and mother vanishes, investigators wonder if she simply just ran away or if it was something far more sinister. The search for answers would take nearly a decade and lead her family on a dark journey they could never have imagined.

programme.title: On the Case: Mixed Signals
programme.desc: Cell phone records may help solve the disturbing murder of a popular teenager.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The travelers slide to a world where Rembrandt "Crying Man" Brown is as huge as Elvis in our world, but after a mysterious "death" eight years ago, this world has had to make do with "Crying Man" impersonators.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders travel to a parallel dimension, which at first glance seems like paradise. Money is given to play the lottery, streets are quiet... it's life in the slow lane and very pleasant.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: On a world where males have been rendered impotent, females eager to repopulate greet the male Sliders as "love gods.''

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Trapped and separated from the other Sliders, Quinn finds himself on an astral plane where only a young girl named Gillian can see or hear him.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn is mistaken for a gunslinger in a world where the code of the Wild West still prevails.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The vengeful and vicious El Sid follows the sliders to a world where San Francisco is a prison facility.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton
programme.desc: An old carpet dug up by workmen in a Cardiff back garden in 1989 was the beginning of a case that would push the boundaries of forensic science. The carpet contained human bones - but whose?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the harrowing case of a London landlord who sadistically tortured and murdered two of his tenants.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Resolution To Kill: Colin Ireland
programme.desc: In the summer of 1993 a serial killer stalked London. The Metropolitan Police investigated a bizarre murder in which a man was found naked on his bed with a dead cat draped over him. He’d been strangled and his flat had been wiped of evidence.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: DNA Of A Murder: Andrew George
programme.desc: Hilda Murrell, a 78-year-old distinguished rose-grower, was found dead in woodland near her home town. Despite a huge investigation by the British police, detectives failed to find her killer and conspiracy theories muddied the waters still further.

programme.title: Killer Britain: Peter Morgan
programme.desc: Millionaire Peter Morgan moved a young mother, Georgina Symonds, into one of his properties, paying her thousands a month to be his ‘girlfriend’. But when the relationship turned sour, he began plotting his revenge.

programme.title: Moesha: Prom Fright
programme.desc: Mo agrees to go to another school’s prom with the son of Frank’s friend so she will no longer be busted.

programme.title: Moesha: Grandpoppa Don’t Take No Mess
programme.desc: Moesha tries to get sympathy from her visiting grandfather over having to go to a new school.

programme.title: Moesha: Labor Day Jammy
programme.desc: Mo’s new school’s annual fund-raiser conflicts with Crenshaw High’s final summer blowout “Freaknik”, and Frank and Dee insist Mo should attend the fund-raiser.

programme.title: Moesha: Day One
programme.desc: Mo attends the first day at her new school and is miserable. She has only made one friend and feels out of place.

programme.title: Moesha: Age Ain’t Nothing
programme.desc: Hakeem begins to date an older woman he meets at his store.

programme.title: Moesha: My Mom’s Not An Ottoman
programme.desc: Dee wins a free decorating consultation at Mo’s school raffle and can’t wait to redo the house.

programme.title: Moesha: The Play Scene
programme.desc: Mo writes a scene from a play set in a Blues Lounge in the 1940s for her English class, and our cast acts it out for us.

programme.title: Moesha: Use Me Once – Shame On You – Use Me Twice I’ll Kill Ya
programme.desc: Mo tells her friends at the Den that Hayley’s dad is an important record executive.

programme.title: Moesha: Keepin’ It Real
programme.desc: Mo is attracted to a classmate she is working with on a project.

programme.title: Moesha: Halloween Part 1 – Kim’s Revenge
programme.desc: Mo, Kim and Niecy decide to dress as “The Women of Batman” for Halloween.

programme.title: Moesha: Break It Down
programme.desc: Frank takes Hakeem to the father/son “lock-in” at the local church, to encourage open communication and trust between fathers and sons.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Valentine's Day Episode
programme.desc: Nick flops in his efforts to help Kevin with Valentine's Day at school.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Parent Teacher Trap Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne serves on a committee at Kevin's school, but complications arise when her fellow female members disrespect her---but adore Nick.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Whose Card Is It Anyway Episode
programme.desc: When Nick misleads Suzanne about spending a gift card, the couple appear before a TV judge to sort out the truth.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Suzanne Gets One-Upped Episode

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The First .45 Episode

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Take Your Kids to Work Day Episode
programme.desc: When Lindsey accompanies Suzanne to work and meets an old friend of her mother's, a misunderstanding causes Lindsey to believe she may have an older brother.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Fall of Troy Episode
