programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Home After Dark
programme.desc: Seventeen year-old Tyson Efird disappears from the parking lot of the grocery store where he works in Malvern, Arkansas.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Taxing Death
programme.desc: After heading out for a routine day of appointments, Montana state auditor Walter Sullivan disappears. Nine days later, his body is found at the bottom of a cliff beside his mangled car.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: Rose Swartwood, an elderly woman living alone in a New York project, is stabbed to death late one night in a frenzied attack. For the next two years the case remains unsolved.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Memphis Police have a prime suspect in the gruesome killings of two prostitutes. But as they prepare to make an arrest, psychic Carol Pate pays the cops a visit.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Homestead Horror
programme.desc: Someone is attacking the elderly female residents of the depressed mill town of Homestead, Pennsylvania. Over the past four years, five women have been raped and assaulted in their own homes.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Bad Company
programme.desc: A Vancouver area nightclub owner disappears into thin air. Police believe he’s fled the city, traveling incognito under one of his many known aliases.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Staunton Stalker
programme.desc: The college town of Staunton, Virginia is being terrorized by a stocking-masked, knife-wielding serial rapist.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Tunnel Vision
programme.desc: Two teenage girls are killed horribly, months apart, on the outskirts of the northern Canadian city of Thunder Bay.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: How Dark the Woods
programme.desc: A lazy day at the lake in upstate New York turns to panic when a five year-old boy disappears into the woods.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to Derbyshire to investigate the New Mills Arts Theatre. This quirky little building has played host to many famous acts and world-renowned plays but has a little-known secret in that it's allegedly haunted.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch
programme.desc: When 12 year old Agnes Ali'iva'a drowned in a ditch in 1992, the police initially thought her death was accidental. It was four years before public and political pressure forced police to re-investigate her death.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where's Grandad?
programme.desc: 65-year-old Alan Gordon Woodford of Bedford St. Mossburn left his home on foot Saturday morning April 20, 1985 and was never seen or heard of again.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep
programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: In this episode of Sensing Murder we learn about the murder of Angela Blackmoore, a 21 year old woman with a 2 year old child. The child was not harmed and the killer has not been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roasts and Ghosts
programme.desc: The TAPS team is the first paranormal team to ever investigate the famed Friar's Club in New York City. Next, the team travels to the Main Street Armory in Rochester, New York.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Stage Fright
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the team heads to Rapids Theater in Niagara Falls, New York where a lonely actress hanged herself backstage. The staff believes her spirit has never left and is haunting the theater.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron
programme.desc: Special guest investigator Meredith Vieira joins the TAPS team, as they investigate Sailors' Snug Harbor in Staten Island, New York. Once a retirement home to weathered seaman, it's now home to the spirit of a murdered matron.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Bloodiest 47 Acres
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Jefferson City, Missouri, to investigate the notorious Missouri State Penitentiary. A prison that was once named one of the most violent prisons in America.Riots, stabbings and executions left thousands dead over the years.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Voices of Pain
programme.desc: On this episode TAPS heads back to the fan favorite; Waverly Hills Sanatorium in Louisville, Kentucky, an abandoned tuberculosis hospital haunted by its former patients and staff.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Distillery of Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Buffalo Trace Distillery in Frankfort, Kentucky to investigate hauntings at the oldest operating distillery in America.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lady Vampire
programme.desc: PRS investigates a case involving single mom, Dawn, and her 5-year-old daughter, both of whom are tormented by the appearance of a hag they call "lady vampire."

programme.title: Paranormal State: School House Haunting
programme.desc: PRS travels to Massachusetts to investigate an old schoolhouse where children's voices disturb a couple who've made it their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Bate Hall Pt 1
programme.desc: Yvette and the MH team travel to the oldest pub in Macclesfield, famous for ghost stories and strange occurrences. Whatever is there makes itself known quickly and violently.

programme.title: Bate Hall Pt 2
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team continue to investigate Macclesfield’s oldest pub and are soon under fire from poltergeist activity. Glen’s scepticism is put fully to the test.

programme.title: Ruthin Pt 1
programme.desc: This old Welsh Castle pushes Yvette’s team of ghost hunters to the limit and at least one of them doesn’t make it to the end…but who? Strange noises and sinister shadows seem to create an atmosphere of foreboding throughout the night.

programme.title: Ruthin Pt 2
programme.desc: The team continue their investigation into Ruthin Castle, as the activity gains momentum one of team is hit hard and has to leave, so the others go in search of whatever is there lurking…all is going well until they find it.

programme.title: Ancient High House
programme.desc: The team are followed around this ancient house said to be the haunt of many long dead spirits. The team are soon put to the test as Gregg feels something is playing with him.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Attic
programme.desc: A series of photographs show what you cannot see with the naked eye: an evil face in the attic.

programme.title: A Haunting: Devil Inside Me
programme.desc: When John Drenner, Jr. finds a satanic bible, he unwittingly unleashes a sinister demon. The entity threatens John with violent physical attacks. Minister Bill Bean must act swiftly to perform a powerful exorcism and oust the demon before it’s too late.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghostly Voices
programme.desc: Angelina Balistreri believes her home is haunted by a harmless ghost, while her husband, Emiliano, is skeptical of the paranormal. They call in a priest and medium who makes contact with a troubled ghost and helps him cross over and find peace.

programme.title: A Haunting: Bewitched
programme.desc: All appears to be on track when Sidney moves his pregnant girlfriend into the home he shares with his mother. But their happiness is suddenly shattered when an ex-friend is trying to tear the couple apart through witchcraft and has endangered everyone.

programme.title: A Haunting: Spirits of the Dead
programme.desc: The Whitley’s buy a farmhouse that houses a negative presence. The presence turns physical.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Wrath
programme.desc: Unsettling nightmares of a dark angry figure plague Cindy as she prepares to move her family.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Two young people are entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: An FBI agent reprises his disguise as an old lady to become a nanny in a crime suspect's house.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace becomes a princess when a summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime.

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A woman is surprised and dismayed when her fiance takes the planning of their wedding too seriously.

programme.title: No Men Beyond This Point
programme.desc: Imagine a world where, since 1953, women have been able to reproduce without men and they are no longer giving birth to male babies. Now, over 60 years later, this deadpan mockumentary follows the youngest man still alive – 37 years-old Andrew Myers.

programme.title: The Hunchback Of Notre Dame
programme.desc: In 15th-century Paris, the brother of the archdeacon plots with the gypsy king to foment a peasant revolt. Meanwhile, a freakish hunchback falls in love with the gypsy queen.

programme.title: A Chorus Line
programme.desc: After narrowing down hundreds of Broadway hopefuls, choreographer Zach (Michael Douglas) leads a select group of dancers on an audition that could change their lives forever in this stunning adaptation of the hit Broadway musical.

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: A young farmer sets out to recruit mercenaries to defend his peaceful planet, which is under threat of invasion by the evil tyrant Sador and his armada of aggressors. Starring: George Peppard, Robert Vaughn, Richard Thomas

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: To everyone’s excitement, Boiler O’Doul arrives in Diablo with the town’s new steam fire engine. When the bank is robbed, Annie must think of a creative way to smoke out the criminals.

programme.title: Bonanza Series
programme.desc: The adventures of Ben Cartwright and his sons as they run and defend their ranch while helping the surrounding community.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Sequoia
programme.desc: The story of Cherokee tribesman Sequoia, who developed the Cherokee written language.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: Gleaming The Cube
programme.desc: A young avid skateboarder uncovers a conspiracy while investigating his adoptive brother's mysterious death.

programme.title: Banana Joe: Banana Joe
programme.desc: A man is living happily on an island with his family, growing bananas. When a local mobster with an eye on man's property tries to take it from him, he must go to the town for the first time to get some help.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: In a quest to find a lost colleague, a team of scientists find themselves deep underground in an ancient labyrinth, while trying to unearth a secret that has been buried for centuries.

programme.title: Clover Bend
programme.desc: An LA cop whose wife is killed in a shootout moves back to his hometown, trying to rebuild a life for himself and his children. Unbeknownst to him, his wife's killers are seeking revenge for one of their own who was also killed in the shootout.

programme.title: Seduced By A Thief
programme.desc: When a security guard is blamed for the theft of a necklace, he tracks down the beautiful thief, only to be seduced into a world of diamond smuggling and double-cross.

programme.title: Murder In The Vineyard
programme.desc: Life is amazing for Emma and her teenage daughter Beatrice when they move from the big city to an idyllic small town, but then Beatrice is hazed at a party one night by mysterious bullies. Emma sets out to find who the culprit is.

programme.title: Space Raiders
programme.desc: A futuristic, sensitive tale of adventure and confrontation when a 10 year old boy is accidentally kidnapped by a spaceship filled with a motley crew of space pirates.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: A United States Navy destroyer escort participates in a Navy "invisibility" experiment that inadvertently sends two sailors forty years into the future. Starring: Michael Paré, Nancy Allen, Eric Christmas

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: A series of uncanny déjà vu events force a man to re-examine his tragic past, memory, instinct, and future.

programme.title: Slow Moe
programme.desc: When struggling baseball player Marvin finds a pair of glasses that transform him into a star player, he thinks he can't win without the glasses. But when they disappear, Marvin's teammates help him realize winning doesn't mean anything.

programme.title: Storm Boy
programme.desc: When Michael Kingley, a successful retired businessman starts to see images from his past that he can't explain, he's forced to remember his childhood and how, as a boy, he rescued and raised an extraordinary orphaned pelican, Mr Percival.

programme.title: The Adventurer: Curse of the Midas Box
programme.desc: Transporting you to a rambunctious realm of enchanting fantasy. When Mariah's little brother is kidnapped, he follows a trail of clues to discover a hidden realm of monsters, ancient secrets and a long-lost artefact. Feat: Michael Sheen & Sam Neill.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Mass Sightings
programme.desc: UFO sightings are at an all time high. What makes these mass sightings incredible is also what makes them terrifying, and what might happen next?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Visitations
programme.desc: Sometimes, the mysterious unidentified objects people see in the sky touch down and leave physical evidence behind.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Physical Contact
programme.desc: These are the witnesses that have been literally touched by the unknown. Do these cases hold the answer to the central question of UFOlogy?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Hot Spots
programme.desc: They keep coming back. There are areas around the world that seem to keep attracting UFOs, where objects return to the skies again and again, as if taunting witnesses below.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Close Encounters
programme.desc: There is no safe place. Every day, all around the world, in the most ordinary places, regular people are spotting UFOs.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Examine the possible components of aliens' protective second layer of skin.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team is joined by a new CSI, Michael Keppler, who assists them on a case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine reluctantly agrees to help Keppler deceive the team in order to catch a murderer

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom is sent a miniature crime scene in a cardboard box to solve before it happens.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the disappearance of a high-school cheerleader and her boyfriend.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Greg investigate a drive-by shooting on a limo.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Lab technician Hodges convinces his colleagues that Grissom needs their help.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plight At The Museum
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's simple job at the Los Angeles Natural History Museum turns deadly when they discover thieves robbing a rare gem exhibit in order to get materials needed to enrich a nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Scorpion: Bat Poop Crazy
programme.desc: Before Halloween, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a deep, vast cave system in order to prevent a bat population from destroying the North America ecosystem.

programme.title: Scorpion: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: On Election Day, as democracy hangs in the balance, Team Scorpion is called on when someone tries to throw the U.S. presidential election into chaos.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sly And The Family Stone
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion travels to Ireland for Megan's one-year memorial, Walter discovers that a nearby lake's natural disaster has created a poisonous cloud that could kill everyone in the village.

programme.title: Scorpion: Mother Load
programme.desc: Paige's estranged mother calls on Team Scorpion when she accidentally uncovers a forgotten nuclear reactor on the verge of exploding.

programme.title: Scorpion: This Is The Pits
programme.desc: Walter must swim through the deadly La Brea Tar Pits when Team Scorpion helps a woman trapped in the tar before she runs out of oxygen.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy’s ideas about what makes a perfect family are put into perspective when she meets an out-of-control teen who needs to be protected from her own conservative family.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s correctional institute while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners. They end up in a lock-down situation that finds Andy and Juliet trapped with a woman desperate to prove her innocence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Letting Go
programme.desc: When Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past, Nick goes off the grid to track the man down. But Juliet is hot on his heels, and Nick is forced to let her into the secrets of his past.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her. But when Andy realizes that the serial rapist we never caught is back, it’s all hands on deck to find Traci

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Home Run
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail’s relationship with her brother is put to the test . Meanwhile, Swarek plans a getaway with Andy up to Oliver’s cabin, which goes off the rails in every possible way

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: In the 28th century, two special operatives (Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne) race against time to save the diverse city of Alpha from a dark force that also jeopardizes the future of the universe.

programme.title: Ender's Game
programme.desc: Young Ender Wiggin is recruited by the International Military to fight against the Formics, an insectoid alien race who had tried to invade Earth and inflicted heavy losses on humankind.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary teenager (Lily Collins) discovers that she is descended from a line of half-angel warriors called Shadowhunters, who protect humanity from evil forces.

programme.title: Cottage to Let
programme.desc: Nazis try to learn the plans and location of a secret bomb sight in Scotland from an Allied scientist.

programme.title: The Black Orchid
programme.desc: Romantic complications in the form of angry children threaten the romance between a gangster's widow and a businessman.

programme.title: Find The Lady
programme.desc: During New Year's Eve, a young model spends the day searching for her grandmother, who has suspiciously gone missing.

programme.title: The Spanish Gardener
programme.desc: Rather undiplomatic British diplomat Harrington Brande takes up his new post in Spain accompanied by his son Nicholas He becomes increasingly jealous of the relationship that develops between his son and the Spanish gardener hired for his estate.

programme.title: JAG: The Bridge At Kang So Ri
programme.desc: Harm and Mac board a plane bound for Korea to investigate charges that GI's shot and killed civilians during the Korean War.

programme.title: JAG: Drop Zone
programme.desc: Mac is prosecuting a SEAL jumpmaster charged with causing the death of one of his men during a parachute insertion exercise.

programme.title: JAG: Real Deal Seal
programme.desc: Medal of Honor Navy SEAL Lt. Curtis Rivers is court-martialed for punching a Congressional candidate who claims to be a Navy SEAL.

programme.title: JAG: Overdue And Presumed Lost
programme.desc: A salvage company tries to claim rights to the wreckage of the USS Dolphin, a WW2 submarine that was lost the day before the attack on Pearl Harbor in 1941.

programme.title: JAG: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: Louis Cellucci is having a rough time aboard the flight deck of the USS Benjamin Harrison. Moments after he walks away from another failed attempt at fixing an F-14, shouts of Man Overboard! are heard across the deck.

programme.title: JAG: To Walk on Wings
programme.desc: Congresswoman Latham and a colleague watch four marine jumpers jump into the ocean from an M22 Osprey. With two marines left to jump, the plane is struck by a swell in the ocean. Harm and Mac are instructed to investigate.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to contain a riot at a maximum-security prison and begin to suspect it’s all a cover for a daring prison break.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A bitter child custody battle sparks a critical incident and the SRU must use a risky “rolling roadblock” maneuver to rescue the children.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One must locate and rescue a politician before a vengeful radio shock jock kills him on the air.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to resolve a gas station robbery but discover it’s connected to a deadly crisis on a cult compound.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Parker is lured into a trap and confronted with a deadly choice: reveal a dark secret from his past or lose his life.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A vigilante, out for blood, goes too far when he takes the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Dan in Real Life
programme.desc: In this down-to-earth dramedy, a widowed advice columnist and single father (Steve Carell) falls in love with a French beauty (Juliette Binoche) only to discover she is dating his brother.

programme.title: Evil Knievel
programme.desc: Bobby Knievel fulfils his dream of owning several car shops. Taking more and more risks in his stunts his popularity grows and he becomes the nation`s hero – the 'King of the Daredevils“.

programme.title: House of D
programme.desc: By working through his past problems, Tom Warshaw, an American artist living in Paris, begins to discover his true self and returns home to reconcile with his family and friends. Starring: David Duchovny, Téa Leoni, Robin Williams

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Trap
programme.desc: A young man discovers a strange parallel universe with dangerous repercussions.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Voice
programme.desc: Young reporter Jared Corning travels to a small New England town to cover the trial of several local people accused of setting fire to a barn owned by unpopular Tom Goss. Jared finds it hard to believe that their aim was to kill a pet raccoon.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Promise
programme.desc: Following the Second World War German ex-prisoner of war Carl Bremer remains in London, working on bomb disposal units. He marries a local woman and she is about to give birth to their child.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Tonight at 12:17
programme.desc: Laura Perkins is expecting a baby, and the pregnancy is worrying her. She is soon shocked to discover, however, that her condition has resulted in her having extraordinary psychic powers.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Where Are They?
programme.desc: In 1922 the town of Chico, California was pelted by rocks falling from an empty sky. A writer who called himself The Ghost took credit for the phenomena, but was never identified.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Legacy of Love
programme.desc: Two people are drawn to a remote town and to each other without explanation.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Rendezvous
programme.desc: A wife is notified that her husband, a Marine, has been lost at sea. However, she refuses to believe that he is dead and knows that he will return to her.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Executioner
programme.desc: In 1862, Confederate soldier Jess Bradley and his faithful dog are captured by a sadistic Union officer, Col. Martin. When Jess' dog is killed, forces from beyond began to take a strange revenge on the colonel.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Last Round
programme.desc: A prizefighter who has fallen on very hard times is visited by the ghost of a fellow boxer, who reminds him of a terrifying old legend that may well come true.

programme.title: Pluto TV 80’s Horror
programme.desc: Slashers, synths, and supernatural scares—Pluto TV 80’s Horror brings you the blood-soaked glory days of fright. From cult classics to VHS gems, relive the decade that made horror iconic. Big hair, bigger screams!

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Jaz's ex-boyfriend arrives from Italy with a plan to save her Olympic career and win her back. Meanwhile, Moira's world is turned upside down when she discovers some shocking news.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity

programme.title: Teen Mom 2

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Walking with Witches
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were a Judeo-Christian attempt to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a special team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Quest for the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Into the Mountains (Tibet)
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Cro Magnon
programme.desc: The debate about humanity's true origins becomes a nefarious fixation as SS leader Heinrich Himmler turns his attention to proving the Paleolithic past of Germany's Aryan race.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Runes
programme.desc: Runes are the letters of an ancient Germanic writing system that harkens back to a mythological age filled with heroes, magic, and mystery.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Fish Fight

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Shark Attack
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, are facing a dangerous new foe, with great white sharks swarming into local waters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sweet Smell of Revenge
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle droves of bumbling amateur fishermen in their bid to catch lucrative Atlantic Bluefin Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Storm Warning
programme.desc: A storm is racing towards the north Atlantic fishing grounds, but with time ticking away on the bluefin tuna season, the captains have no choice but to head out to fish in the rough weather.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Hell On The High Seas
programme.desc: It is week eight of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, and cracks are starting to show in the Gloucester fleet, with captains and crews pushing each other to the limit.

programme.title: Wardens: Serving Warrants and Ice Fishing
programme.desc: Conservation Officers serve warrants to a suspect believed to have taken 18 deer without licenses

programme.title: Wardens: Michigan Bears
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers enforce bear hunting regulations in a variety of ways; the state's DNR uses many methods to track the state's bear numbers.

programme.title: Wardens: Firearm Opener

programme.title: Wardens: Snowmobiles and Oktoberfest
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers patrol a weekend party and make sure snowmobilers are riding safely.

programme.title: Wardens: White Bass Patrol
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers observe anglers from a distance to make sure they're doing things by the book before contacting them when they suspect illegal activities.

programme.title: Wardens: River Patrol
programme.desc: Conservation Officers patrol a busy river during a summer weekend and efforts are made to improve fish habitats.

programme.title: Wardens: Buck Warrant and ORV Stickers

programme.title: Wardens: Michigan Elk

programme.title: Wardens: D4 Salmon

programme.title: Wardens: Deer Seasons

programme.title: Arthur: Swept Away/Germophobia
programme.desc: Arthur, D.W. and Buster are spending a few days at the beach. Can they save their sandcastle from the ocean tides? Buster's friends have had enough of his sloppy habits, so they band together to educate him on the realities of bacteria.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Chicken Pox/Sick As A Dog
programme.desc: The circus is in town and the whole family's excited—until Arthur gets CHICKEN POX! Will he recover in time? Then, Arthur's worst fears come true when poor, sick Pal has to sleep overnight at the vet's office. Could it be something he did?

programme.title: Arthur: So Funny I Forgot to Laugh/The Best Day Ever
programme.desc: Arthur thinks his jokes about Sue Ellen's new sweater are in good fun but Sue Ellen's feelings are hurt. Has Arthur become a bully? Everyone is reminiscing about their "best days." Except Arthurs. Is it possible he doesn't have one?

programme.title: Arthur: Listen Up!/Arthur's New Old Vacation
programme.desc: When Francine's Bubbe passes away, Muffy tries to understand how she can help her friend. Then, when Arthur's family goes on the same vacation they take every year, he and Buster try to make it more exciting.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella Sees the Light/Return of the Snowball
programme.desc: For her sleepover with Marina, Prunella redecorates her room. But Marina is blind--will the decorations she can't see offend her, or worse, make her trip? D.W. has been trying to solve the mystery of her snowball's disappearance.

programme.title: Arthur: Castles in the Sky/Tipping the Scales
programme.desc: The gang is devastated after their tree house collapses. Can architect Frank Gehry help them to rebuild? Everyone in Arthur's chorus group is excited about their upcoming performance in Crown City.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Library Card/Arthur's Big Hit
programme.desc: When D.W. discovers that she can get her own library card, she rejoices at the world of books waiting for her. And, is it ever okay to hit someone? Sometimes you just get so mad, you wanna....pow! Right??

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy With His Head In The Clouds/More!
programme.desc: All the kids know that George is smart--so why does he sometimes have trouble reading and writing? Then, D.W. is thrilled to be getting an allowance. At last, she'll be rich and powerful!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Today is the big dance party in the park. Barney tells Baby Bop the story of “The Princess Without a Song to Sing.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: As he watches birds fly overhead, Riff begins to daydream of flying himself. After seeing all the Moms playing with their kids in the Park, Baby Bop wonders what makes somebody a Mommy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Fountain of Fun
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns that having a pet is a bigger responsibility than he expected when he takes care of a friend’s dog. When Baby Bop’s favorite teddy bear is torn, she wants to take him to the vet for help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an Art Show project that Melanie has made. A Park Kid named Myra has decided she doesn't like her name.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Riff find a pirate map, but in order to find the treasure, they have to be able to count. It’s time for a music concert in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop meets a new girl named Jill who doesn’t want to join the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: At Home in the Park
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Megatron sacrifices Starscream, leaving him to face the Autobots alone while the Decepticons infiltrate the Autobot base to capture the Requiem Blaster. Smokescreen sacrifices himself to try to protect the Blaster minicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Regeneration
programme.desc: Hearing Megatron say he is nothing more than disposable cannon fodder, Starscream defects with the Star Sabre. To prove he's genuine, he gives the Autobots details of the moon base. Red Alert works on what's left of Smokescreen.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Rescue
programme.desc: With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base, attempting to rescue all the minicons Megatron has captured and forced into building a spaceship.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mars
programme.desc: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars. Starscream gets there first, but is disabled by Tidalwave. Jetfire rescues him: on the way back Starscream spots and tries to entice the minicon. But first they must get past Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crack
programme.desc: With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Threaten
programme.desc: Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon. Installed on their new ship, the Decepticons test it on a comet - then Megatron orders Starscream to use it to destroy the Autobot base. Problem is, that'll also destroy the earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crisis
programme.desc: Optimus and Jetfire attack the ship, but can't stop the Hydra Cannon being deployed. Optimus makes the ultimate sacrifice and takes the full blast. Afterwards only his minicon and his matrix are found, but at least earth survives.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Remorse
programme.desc: Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons: Scavenger, with the support of the minicons, reminds him of their true purpose. With Hot Shot's realisation of the right way forward, Jetfire hands over command to him.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Depart
programme.desc: With the Autobot ship ready to leave, Hot Shot, supported by the rest of the team, refuse to let the children accompany them. But then the minicons refuse to allow the ship to depart unless the kids are on board.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Miracle
programme.desc: As the Axalon chases the Decepticon ship, hundreds of minicons appear. The 'Cons turn back to fight, and the 'Bots seem doomed, but the minicons resurrect Optimus.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Puppet
programme.desc: Hot Shot and Red Alert are sucked through a wormhole. The minicons guide the Axalon to their location, where they are all attacked by Nemesis Prime. As the planet breaks up, the 'Cons shoot down the Axalon and escape.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon turns his tidying into play, he and Rita are in their element looking for as much dust as they can possibly find.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: After making a beautiful vase for Mother's Day, Pompon sets out to find the perfect flower for it.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: For Father's Day, Pompon writes a funny little poem for his dad, drawing inspiration from the elements of nature that he meets on his way. But Mr Castorovitch informs him that poetry should follow certain rules.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon had so much fun making jokes on April Fool's Day that he now wants to joke all the time, but he is forced to understand that jokes have limits.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon needs to wash before attending a concert. The young bear insists on bathing without his mother's help, asserting he is no longer a baby. However, he soon discovers that reaching his back is quite challenging when attempting to bathe alone.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Ants invade the Bear family's den. Pompon is happy to share his home, but draws the line at sharing his honey toast. Determined to solve the problem, he sets out to find an ideal new habitat for the intrusive little ants.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon returns from a woodland expedition with unwelcome guests, fleas in his fur. He detests the strong-smelling shampoo used to treat them. The young bear becomes determined to avoid getting fleas again at all costs.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon faces a series of mishaps one morning. He stumbles over toys, knocks over his honey pot, and feels abandoned by Rita. His mood sours, apparently exacerbated by starting the day on the wrong foot.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: During a sleepover with Rita, Pompon loses his first milk tooth. He is excited to receive a gift from the Tooth Mouse. However, Pompon wants Rita to have a present too, so they decide to approach the Tooth Mouse directly with their request.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon embarks on an expedition with his parents. He selects a large tree stump as a makeshift backpack to carry all his `essential' items. However, once filled, the stump proves far too heavy for the young bear to manage.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon catches his mother preparing a surprise show for Georges' birthday. She asks him to keep it secret, but the little bear finds it challenging to hold his tongue.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: During a stargazing night with his parents and Rita, Pompon is delighted to discover a constellation bearing his name. Unfortunately, Rita finds no such honour, which slightly spoils her evening.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: As he cannot sleep this evening, Pompon convinces himself that he is probably a nocturnal animal. Playing along, the parents entrust him to Adèle, their bat friend, in the hope that their cub will become discouraged by discovering the nightlife.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon and Georges aim to create unforgettable memories from their trip, much like Agnès the stork. However, when their raft begins to take on water, they realise that adventure can be found right there in their own forest.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon sets out to grow an enormous pumpkin. Impatient for results, he convinces himself that more watering will lead to faster growth. To improve his chances, he diverts water from the lake to flood the vegetable garden.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Upon discovering earthworms in the garden's pungent compost, Pompon feels sympathy for them. He decides to bring them into his room, hoping to provide them with a life of comfort similar to his own.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon decides to bake a cake for his friends but worries about pleasing everyone's tastes. Undeterred, he combines all his friends' favourite ingredients, creating `Tartatou'.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon becomes upset after missing the sunrise with Rita due to brushing his teeth. He resolves to eat only `clean' food henceforth, hoping to avoid dirtying his teeth and future tooth-brushing delays.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon develops hiccups that cause him to ruin the painting he was creating for his father. Determined to continue his artwork, he begins testing various methods to rid himself of the hiccups.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: During a slumber party with Rita, Pompon realises that he wet the bed during the night. To avoid having to tell his friend the truth, he makes up a story but ends up completely confused.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Georges takes Pompon to learn to fish, bear-style, but it's not easy to catch fish with his little paws. Fortunately, with a little imagination, Pompon finds another way to bring the meal back to the den.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon goes on holiday and won't see Rita for two months. Fearing she will forget him, he comes up with a plan, but seeing her playing with Gabi, he thinks she's already forgotten him.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Rita is sad because the beautiful flower she was looking for has faded. Pompon does everything to cheer her up, without realising that sometimes we need to accept our sadness for it to pass.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, and the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favourite team. However, Masha gets bored while waiting for a goal so she goes outside looking for one.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky counts to five. The Teletubbies watch some children feeding lambs. Dipsy makes up a magic tune and wakes up the other Teletubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky is looking for the other Teletubbies. He can’t see any of them so he shouts out ‘Big Hug’ and all the Teletubbies come running for a big hug.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children visit a Sealife centre to look at seahorses. The Teletubbies go looking for interesting things. Tinky Winky sees his reflection in a puddle. Dipsy sees different clouds.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky makes some adjustments on the switch panel. He joins the other Tubbies to watch a little girl exploring a harp and making music.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa comes through to door to say ‘eh-oh’, she joins the others to watch some children squeezing things. A squeezy tube appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a walking dance. They stop to watch a group of children are riding on a rickshaw. In Teletubbyland, Po is riding her scooter.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Dipsy step in some mud. They join Laa-Laa and Po to watch a little girl polish her family’s shoes. A magical carpet appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy and Laa-Laa are out for a walk and Po is riding her scooter, but where is Tinky Winky? When the other Tubbies see him they chase him all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two children making music using saucepans. Tinky Winky hears a noise coming from inside the house. He goes inside to find Po making Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little girl draw a picture on a paving slab using chalks. A cloud appears in Teletubbyland and rains and rains and makes a big beautiful rainbow.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: There is great excitement at Bob’s yard when his new metal detector is delivered. He plans to use it to find a burst pipe in Farmer Pickles’ field, and promises Muck that afterwards they will hunt for buried treasure.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles is having problems with mice eating his barley seed so he asks Bob to build a seed store to keep it safe. Whilst Bob is working, Farmer Pickles decides to go and buy some replacement seed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a big day. The team are building Farmer Pickles new factory which will turn sunflowers into sunflower oil. Everyone is excited to meet Marjorie, who arrives by bicycle. Marjorie has been brought on board by Farmer Pickles to manage the factory.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are building a pedestrian crossing. Mrs Percival, meanwhile, has asked Molly to paint a mural of a jungle scene in the school playground.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are building a special flat-packed eco-home for Marjorie. When Muck and Benny spot Marjorie’s canvas tent and Spud’s straw-house, they wonder what else houses can be made from.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Pam Goody is running out of money to complete the Arts Centre renovations and Molly suggests holding a fashion show to raise funds. Pam thinks this a wonderful idea and asks Molly to organise it. Bob is, of course, just the man to build a catwalk.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Ellis needs Bob to replace an old rotten beam in his cottage. The gang set off for Mr Ellis’s and Pilchard sneaks along – she knows that cottages are popular with mice! At the cottage, Mr Ellis reports some strange goings-on at the cottage.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a marshland walkway with his Dad’s help. Benny hears that the marsh is ‘like a jungle’ and becomes determined to finds some jungle animals like tigers. Every time he spots one, however, it turns out to be something very ordinary.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are replacing some old pipes outside the town hall. Molly, meanwhile, is practicing for her first aid exam with a reluctant JJ as guinea pig. When Wendy calls JJ’s yard to order a special pipe and Molly offers to deliver it.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A new machine has come to the Valley – Packer the Delivery Truck. He’s to work with Farmer Pickles team. Farmer Pickles gives Packer his jobs and he sets off on his first delivery round.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scrambler is desperate to help Bob build a drying barn for Farmer Pickles sunflower farm. Scruffty is also excited about the building job and runs and jumps about getting in everyone’s way.

programme.title: Scrambler to the Rescue
programme.desc: Its winter in Sunflower Valley and Bob and his team are building a concert hall in time for a special winter celebration. Scrambler is especially keen to help – but is frustrated that there’s nothing for an energetic quad-bike to do!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is replacing a potting shed on Mr Beasley’s allotment. In the old shed is a chest which Mr Beasley doesn’t need any more. Meanwhile Wendy calls at JJ’s for the materials for the new shed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Team are converting Mr Sabatini’s windmill into a café. Roley is rolling the ground flat for all the tables and chairs while Bob makes the awnings. Roley hits trouble when molehills keep appearing where he’s just been rolling.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building an extraordinary new cave-house for Sandy Beach – a caveman expert who’s moving to the valley to study how cavemen used to live. The team are all head into the mountains.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles has decided to open a camp site on his land, and Bob is installing a shower block and fence to keep the sheep out. For once, he is working on his own while Wendy goes on holiday with Jenny.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Robert’s come to the valley to spend some quality time with Bob. They have a plan to spend the afternoon birdwatching – Robert wants to see the very rare lesser-striped sunflower warbler.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building a bunkhouse for Farmer Pickles guests The Pickers! Micky, Vicky and Little Ricky are helping with the sunflower harvest. The cabin is to be made of logs so Lofty’s job is very important today, lifting and laying the logs.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to Derbyshire to investigate the New Mills Arts Theatre. This quirky little building has played host to many famous acts and world-renowned plays but has a little-known secret in that it's allegedly haunted.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 2
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team is ready for act II at the New Mills Arts Theatre. With so much apparent activity happening at this unassuming theatre, the team just couldn't leave when so much more could happen.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits at The Lord Eldon
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to the old town of Knutsford, Cheshire to investigate the historic Lord Eldon Inn, hoping to contact the spirit of Sarah Ann Pollitt who is said to haunt the pub.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Monks and Demons at The Rutland Arms Hotel
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team journeys to Nottingham and the historic Rutland Arms Hotel. The pub and hotel have seen several centuries of change, and with that change came tragedy.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Final Session at Galleries of Justice
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travel back in time to The Galleries of Justice in Nottingham. This was a one stop shop for justice where criminals were held awaiting trial.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Distillery of Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Buffalo Trace Distillery in Frankfort, Kentucky to investigate hauntings at the oldest operating distillery in America.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Membership Denied
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Hartford, CT to Elks Lodge, the oldest and largest secret fraternal organizations in the country. Elks Lodge #19 is shrouded in mystery and tragedy with a gruesome death hanging over its head....and decades of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Christmas Spirit
programme.desc: TAPS gets into the spirit with an investigation of Bethlehem, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roller Ghoster
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS heads to Ohio to investigate Kings Island, anamusement park that sits on land that was thesite of an awful accident.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Buyer Beware
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Naples, New York, to investigate the Naples Hotel.This hotel was built in 1895.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Ancient High House
programme.desc: The team are followed around this ancient house said to be the haunt of many long dead spirits. The team are soon put to the test as Gregg feels something is playing with him.

programme.title: Leopard Inn Pt 1
programme.desc: The upper room of the Leopard Inn are now a set of deserted rooms and corridors that were once a Victorian Hotel, although way past its heyday some of the borders seem to have stayed. This episode sees the team get their most convincing evidence to date.

programme.title: Leopard Inn Pt 2
programme.desc: The team continue in the abandoned old hotel but something seems to be stalking them. Yvette has a close encounter alone in the corridors with disembodied footsteps walking toward her and aggressive poltergeist activity plagues the rest of the team

programme.title: Leopard Inn Pt 3
programme.desc: In the final part of their investigation into the abandoned old hotel above the Leopard Inn, Yvette and her team are tested again to their very limits.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette starts the new series with an investigation at the haunted Eden Camp. Strange noises and an unknown force try to separate the team. Can they endure the entire investigation, or will the paranormal activity prove too much for them to handle?
